vote.text: Amendment SA 4785 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 4785 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Klobuchar. To amend the preamble.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4785 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Klobuchar.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 4785 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
